CustomField.description: One Federal Decision (OFD) target timeline in calendar days from application receipt to final federal authorization. Set by the lead agency coordinator at initiation for FAST-41 covered projects (nepa_fast41_covered__c = true). Used by NEPA_OFD_Variance_Alert to flag overruns when nepa_days_elapsed__c exceeds this value.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: OFD target completion days (from application receipt). Required for FAST-41 FPISC dashboard reporting.
CustomField.label: OFD Target Days
